key_themes: Undervaluation with low P/E (~5.4) in S&P 500
Analyst consensus moderate buy with ~17% upside
Focus on Peacock, broadband trends ahead of Q1 earnings
summary: CMCSA trades at historically attractive valuations with a reliable ~4.5% dividend yield and one of the lowest P/E ratios among S&P 500 names, drawing value investor interest despite forecasted EPS declines of ~15-20% for 2026 due to streaming investments and industry pressures. Analysts maintain a moderate buy stance with an average price target near $34.80 (17%+ upside from ~$29.60 levels), and the company has a track record of earnings beats. With Q1 2026 results due April 23, sentiment is cautiously optimistic as investors watch broadband/wireless momentum and Peacock progress amid mixed social media chatter.
sources: 12+ news articles (Yahoo Finance, Comcast IR, MarketBeat, TradingEconomics), 15+ recent X posts (primarily April 2026)
